title: PC (EtherNet) Connection
description:
PC (EtherNet) Connection

PC (EtherNet) Connection

When connecting to a Controller for which a public (global) IP address is configured, connection authentication using password is required.

When connecting to a Controller for which a private (local) IP address is configured, connection authentication using password is optional.

Note: Authentication is performed when the authentication password for a PC Ethernet connection is configured.
